sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Nothing meaningful changed - just the white border pixel count shifted from 61 to 60. Clicking the orange ring didn't move any game objects. So clicking rings only works for the purple ring (which moved the white star), not the orange ring.
Let me reconsider the mechanics. Looking at what happened:
1. Clicked gray diamond at [7, 49] → white star moved to [7, 49]
2. Clicked purple ring at [18, 57] → white star moved to [16, 57] (inside ring), orange square shifted
3. Clicked orange ring → nothing happened
Maybe the mechanic is: clicking a gray diamond moves the white star there, and clicking a ring moves the white star there. But the orange ring didn't work...
Wait, let me look at the image more carefully. The white star is already in the purple ring. Maybe I need to move the orange square to the orange ring? Let me try clicking the orange square itself.
